name: Improve WebRTC streaming throughput toward TCP

description: baseline: add autoresearch harness for tcp vs webrtc-direct throughput ratio; benchmark passes at ~0.0600 ratio but checks failed because package-local test script could not find aegir via pnpm filter
baseline: add autoresearch benchmark/check harness and validate current WebRTC Direct throughput ratio at ~0.0653 vs tcp
try resuming WebRTC stream writes at maxBufferedAmount instead of waiting for full drain by setting bufferedAmountLowThreshold to the high-water mark; no improvement on throughput ratio

try flattening each framed WebRTC message into a single RTCDataChannel send call to reduce per-message overhead; crashed during benchmark with libdatachannel reporting DataChannel is closed on bufferedamountlow resume
try using negotiated SCTP maxMessageSize for streams and stop hard-capping WebRTC Direct peer connections at 16KiB; benchmark crashed with WebRTC stream resets during throughput
